title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go CLI and server that bundles, serves and manages Llama-2, Code Llama, Mistral, Gemma and other GGUF models with a simple REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration providing Ollama LLM, embed and chat wrappers with callback support.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (React/Flask) that talks to any Ollama model; supports multi-user, RAG, code highlighting.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Tauri desktop app for macOS/Windows/Linux to chat with local models via Ollama.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, conversation history and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like inline assistant.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub with multi-arch support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store; ingest PDFs and chat over them.

title: ollama-agents
summary: Experimental multi-agent framework where each agent is a dedicated Ollama model communicating via NATS.

title: ollama-express
summary: Express.js middleware that proxies OpenAI-style requests to Ollama; drop-in replacement for front-end apps.

title: ollama-gradle-plugin
summary: Gradle plugin to download, cache and spin up Ollama models for integration tests in JVM projects.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaTextEmbedder nodes for pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local models through slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module to run Ollama model tests inside pipelines without GPU hosts (uses CPU fallback).

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake packaging Ollama server and CLI for reproducible deployments on NixOS.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing async wrappers over Ollama’s REST API with Serde types.

title: ollama-kotlin
summary: Kotlin multiplatform SDK for Android/JVM targeting Ollama, coroutine-first with Ktor client.
